children.heading: Review of National Institute of Food and Agriculture
children.label: a Review of National Institute of Food and Agriculture

children.heading: Peer review of research grants
children.label: 1 Peer review of research grants
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures that provide for scientific peer review of each agricultural research grant administered, on a competitive basis, by the National Institute of Food and Agriculture of the Department.

children.heading: Relevance and merit review of research, extension, and education grants
children.label: 2 Relevance and merit review of research, extension, and education grants

children.heading: Establishment of procedures
children.label: A Establishment of procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures that provide for relevance and merit review of each agricultural research, extension, or education grant administered, on a competitive basis, by the National Institute of Food and Agriculture.

children.heading: Consultation with Advisory Board
children.label: B Consultation with Advisory Board
children.text: The Secretary shall consult with the Advisory Board in establishing the merit review procedures on a continuous basis.

children.heading: Consideration
children.label: 3 Consideration
children.text: Peer and merit review procedures established under paragraphs (1) and (2) shall not take the offer or availability of matching funds into consideration.

the relevance to the priorities established under of the funding of all agricultural research, extension, or education activities conducted or funded by the Department; andsection 7612(a) of this title
the adequacy of the funding.

children.heading: Review results
children.label: 1 Review results
children.text: As soon as practicable after the review is conducted under subsection (b) for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall consider the results of the review when formulating each request for proposals, and evaluating proposals, involving an agricultural research, extension, or education activity funded, on a competitive basis, by the Department.

children.heading: Input
children.label: 2 Input
children.text: In formulating a request for proposals described in paragraph (1) for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall solicit and consider input from persons who conduct or use agricultural research, extension, or education regarding the prior year’s request for proposals.

children.heading: Scientific peer review of agricultural research
children.label: d Scientific peer review of agricultural research

children.heading: Peer review procedures
children.label: 1 Peer review procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures that ensure scientific peer review of all research activities conducted by the Department.

children.heading: Review panel required
children.label: 2 Review panel required
children.text: As part of the procedures established under paragraph (1), a review panel shall verify, at least once every 5 years, that each research activity of the Department and research conducted under each research program of the Department has scientific merit and relevance.

children.label: A
children.text: the scientific merit and relevance of the activity or research in light of the priorities established pursuant to ; andsection 7612 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the national or multistate significance of the activity or research.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A review panel shall be composed of individuals with scientific expertise, a majority of whom are not employees of the agency whose research is being reviewed.

children.heading: Scientists from colleges and universities
children.label: B Scientists from colleges and universities
children.text: To the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary shall use scientists from colleges and universities to serve on the review panels.

children.heading: Submission of results
children.label: 5 Submission of results
children.text: The results of the panel reviews shall be submitted to the Advisory Board.

children.label: A
children.text: establish a process for merit review of the activity; and

children.label: B
children.text: review the activity in accordance with the process.

children.text: establish a process for merit review of the activity; and
